title: Lamb Kebabs with a Dry Kenyan Rub
description: A flavorful and spicy dish featuring lamb kebabs with a dry rub inspired by Kenyan cuisine, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the dry rub ingredients.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the dry rub.
4. Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
5. Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
7. Remove the kebabs from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with a squeeze of lemon juice.
